title: God Speed You! Black Emperor
original_title: ゴッド・スピード・ユー! BLACK EMPEROR
overview: 1970s Japan saw the rise of biker gangs, known as Bōsōzoku, which drew the interest of the media. God Speed You! Black Emperor follows a member of the bike gang and his interaction with his parents, after he gets in trouble with the police.
